ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transcripts" (
  "transcript_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transcript */,
  "group_label" TEXT /* Group label categorizing the transcript */,
  "index_no" INTEGER /* Index number for the transcription entry */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the transcript segment */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the transcript segment */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the transcript segment */,
  "transcript_text" TEXT /* The text of the transcript */,
  "question_mark" INTEGER /* Indicates if a question is present */,
  "ellipsis" INTEGER /* Indicates if an ellipsis is present */,
  "nwords" INTEGER /* Total number of words in the transcript */,
  "duration_seconds" REAL /* Total duration in seconds */,
  "words_per_second" REAL /* Average words spoken per second */,
  "certainty_level" INTEGER /* Certainty level classification */,
  "audio_file" TEXT /* Audio file associated with the transcript */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date and time the transcript was uploaded */,
  "sentiment_analysis" TEXT /* Sentiment analysis result for the transcript */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transcript_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transcripts_group_label FOREIGN KEY ("group_label") REFERENCES groups ("group_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transcripts_certainty_level FOREIGN KEY ("certainty_level") REFERENCES certainty_levels ("certainty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the group */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category or type of group */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date and time the group was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., client, analyst, admin) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* User's organization or department */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date and time the user registered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "transcript_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transcript being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the transcript */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the transcript was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the transcript */,
  "device_info" TEXT /* User's device or browser information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_transcript_id FOREIGN KEY ("transcript_id") REFERENCES transcripts ("transcript_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "transcript_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transcript containing the question */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the question */,
  "answer_text" TEXT /* Answer text if available */,
  "question_type" TEXT /* Type of question (e.g., open-ended, multiple-choice) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_transcript_id FOREIGN KEY ("transcript_id") REFERENCES transcripts ("transcript_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ellipses" (
  "ellipse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ellipse occurrence */,
  "transcript_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transcript containing the ellipse */,
  "ellipse_position" INTEGER /* Position in the transcript where the ellipse occurs */,
  "ellipse_context" TEXT /* Context surrounding the ellipse (e.g., words or phrases) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ellipse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ellipses_transcript_id FOREIGN KEY ("transcript_id") REFERENCES transcripts ("transcript_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "certainty_levels" (
  "certainty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each certainty level */,
  "certainty_label" TEXT /* Label for the certainty level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the certainty level */,
  "detailed_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the certainty level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("certainty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "duration_analysis" (
  "duration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the duration analysis record */,
  "transcript_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transcript related to this analysis */,
  "average_duration" REAL /* Average duration of speech segments */,
  "total_duration" REAL /* Total combined duration of all segments */,
  "average_pause_duration" REAL /* Average pause duration between speech segments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("duration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_duration_analysis_transcript_id FOREIGN KEY ("transcript_id") REFERENCES transcripts ("transcript_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transcript_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version record */,
  "transcript_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transcript being versioned */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the transcript */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who updated the transcript */,
  "update_comments" TEXT /* Comments or description for the version update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transcript_versions_transcript_id FOREIGN KEY ("transcript_id") REFERENCES transcripts ("transcript_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "transcript_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transcript the tag is related to */,
  "tag" TEXT /* Text of the tag */,
  "tag_category" TEXT /* Category of the tag (e.g., topic, theme) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tags_transcript_id FOREIGN KEY ("transcript_id") REFERENCES transcripts ("transcript_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "speaker_info" (
  "speaker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each speaker */,
  "transcript_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transcript the speaker is related to */,
  "speaker_name" TEXT /* Name of the speaker */,
  "speaker_title" TEXT /* Title or role of the speaker */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("speaker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_speaker_info_transcript_id FOREIGN KEY ("transcript_id") REFERENCES transcripts ("transcript_id")
)
